positive: A maximalist, stylized illustration of a celestial forest scene. Dominant elements include bioluminescent flora, towering, gnarled dream-wood trees with flowing roots, and gentle, abstract stardust particulate. A central composition features a pair of elegant, winged mythical creatures (like stylized griffins or phoenixes, but rendered purely abstractly) flying through glowing canopies. The overall mood is magical and mysterious. Style should be a highly saturated, deep indigo and turquoise cyberpunk anime style mixed with Art Nouveau organic curves. Use strong, clean silhouettes against varying gradients of deep violet and neon teal. Focus on perfect symmetry and dramatic overhead lighting emphasizing the luminous qualities of the leaves and fauna. Perfect for repeating textile patterns. Highly detailed, vector quality, 8K.
negative: blurry, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, noise, text, watermark, signatures, logos, simple, monochrome, realistic photo, sketch
